theory.title: Basic Color Theory (Overview)
theory.desc: We cover fundamentals such as color wheel, complements, analogous colors, primary colors, RGB/CMYK differences, and color temperature.

camera.title: Camera Color Picker
camera.desc: Shows the color of the center pixel in real time

cameraCvd.title: Color Vision Simulation
cameraCvd.desc: Applies simulated color vision types to the camera feed.

colors.title: Color Catalog (JIS Traditional)
colors.desc: Filter by keyword or category, and view details and complements.

colorAnalysis.title: Image color analysis
colorAnalysis.desc: Upload an image to extract dominant colors with K-means on a downscaled copy. Near-white/black backgrounds and clusters covering most of the image are grouped separately; slightly saturated colors are boosted when ranking. Click a chip to copy HEX.
colorAnalysis.error: Could not load this image. Try another file.
colorAnalysis.noDominant: No dominant colors left after background filtering.

my.title: My Page
my.desc: See your preferences and favorites at a glance.
my.favoritesEmpty: No favorites yet. Tap the heart on any page to save.

prismatrix.title: Prismatrix
prismatrix.desc: From the final 4×4 board, deduce the colors and placements of six 2×2 translucent tiles (12 hues).

hints.topLeftOnly: Click the gap between 4 cells to place (x,y ∈ {0,1,2})

messages.generateFailed: Failed to generate a puzzle. Please try again.
messages.selectUpToSix: You can select up to 6 tiles.
messages.pickActiveTile: Pick an active tile to place (from your selected tiles).
messages.pickFromSelected: Select a tile from the palette first.
messages.invalidTopLeft: Only cells with x,y in 0–2 can be the top-left.
messages.overlapExceeded: Overlap exceeds the limit (max {{max}}). Try another position.

prismatrix.solutionHint: The completed board glows, then tiles lift up from the top one by one.
